title: Northman
content:
The gale that wrecked you on the sand,
    It helped my rowers to row;
    The storm is my best galley hand
    And drives me where I go.
meaning:
Ralph Waldo Emerson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Northman"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
